title: KB's Kustomz v2
description: This site was designed for my client to showcase his services and skills and increase customer leads. I remodeled this after an older version that I created in 2023. Some improvements include using the NEXT.js > Github > Vercel workflow, enhanced SEO, etc.

title: JarvisBot Discord Bot
description: I created this Discord bot to be able to look up Marvel Rivals characters and view their stats. I also integrated Google AI in order to give the users the ability to ask any question to the JarvisBot, much like the actual Jarvis in Marvel

title: ABCU Project
description: This is my Code and Reflection that I completed during my Data Structures and Algorithms: Analysis and Design course while persuing my Bachelors in Computer Science with a concentration in Software Engineering at Southern New Hampshire University

title: Python Regression
description: The goal of this project was to predict the Opioid Death Rate for the year 2021 using the most accurate model.
